summary_sections.title: Lesson Overview
summary_sections.content_html:
Overview

This lesson covers the fundamental measures of center used to analyze and summarize data sets. You'll learn how to calculate and apply the mean, median, and mode, and understand when each is most appropriate.

summary_sections.title: Real-World Applications
summary_sections.content_html:
Real-World Applications

Example: Which term is described by: "Environmental infrastructure like green spaces, wetlands, and permeable surfaces that manage water and reduce pollution"?

This description refers to "Green Infrastructure".

Example: Which example demonstrates the practical relevance of Urban Sustainability and Planning?

This is a real-world application of Urban Sustainability and Planning.
